body:
# Level-Up Agent Hijacking Fix & E2E Evidence Hardening

> [!TIP]
> **Skeptical Audit Status**: PASS ✅ (Verified Iteration 018)
> **Final Evidence Gist**: https://gist.github.com/jleechan2015/55ed9c2a266d6debd20c48557bf8aa7e
> **System Standard**: Bulletproof Evidence v3 (Signed Traces)

## Background
The `LevelUpAgent` routing was being hijacked by the `CharacterCreationAgent` because `world_logic.py` was unconditionally setting the `level_up_pending` flag even when a character creation session was in progress. This led to a "modal deadlock" where the user was presented with level-up choices that would fail to process because the active agent was still in character creation mode.

## Goals
- Resolve the agent hijacking by implementing guarded flag updates.
- Harden the E2E test harness to comply with "Bulletproof Evidence" standards (v3), specifically capturing mandatory server logs and LLM traces.
- Verify the fix with a high-fidelity regression test that simulates the hijack condition.

## High-Level Description
- **Refactored `world_logic.py`**: Added `character_creation_in_progress` guards to `_maybe_trigger_level_up_modal` (Lines 3472, 3500) to prevent premature level-up activation.
- **Hardened `base_test.py`**:
    - Implemented `EVIDENCE_SIGNATURE_GUARD` (with case-insensitive log validation) to ensure audit trail integrity via hmac-sha256 signing.
    - Added mandatory server process cleanup (`server.stop()`) on all health-check failures to prevent process leaks.
- **Two-Step E2E Verification**: Updated the regression test to a two-step flow ensuring routing is validated AFTER state reload from Firestore.

## Testing & Evidence (Iteration 018)
The fix has been verified via a standard-compliant E2E regression test.

### Claim → Artifact Map (Bulletproof Standards)

| Claim | Required Proof | Artifact Gist Reference |
|---|---|---|
| **Routing Integrity** | `agent_mode` is `level_up` under hijack conditions | `run.json` → `scenarios[0].agent_mode` |
| **Audit Traceability** | Raw LLM request/response payload capture | `trace_sample.jsonl` |
| **Response Authenticity** | HMAC-SHA256 signatures for LLM output | `trace_sample.jsonl` → `streaming_response_signature` |
| **System Visibility** | Server-side runtime log capture | `server_audit.log` |
| **Environment Health** | Verified brain loading & Semantic Routing | `server_audit.log` → "🧠 CLASSIFIER" |

**Full Evidence Bundle (Local Workspace):**
`/tmp/worktree_levelup_e2e_fix/fix_level-up-e2e-harness-streaming/level_up_agent_hijack_real_e2e/iteration_018/`

<!-- CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
---

> [!NOTE]
> **Medium Risk**
> Touches core gameplay state mutation in `world_logic.py` and adds new evidence/signing enforcement in the E2E harness, which could affect routing behavior and test pass/fail criteria. Most changes are additive/guarded but interact with environment variables and logging/capture paths.
> 
> **Overview**
> **Prevents level-up modal routing from activating during character creation** by adding explicit `character_creation_in_progress` early-return guards in `world_logic._maybe_trigger_level_up_modal`, plus a unit test to ensure no level-up flags or logs are emitted in that state.
> 
> **Hardens LLM trace evidence capture and integrity checks** by attaching a `streaming_response_signature` into `processing_metadata` for both streaming and non-streaming LLM paths, passing `processing_metadata` through `_log_raw_llm_data`, and making raw-request capture more resilient to serialization failures/fallbacks.
> 
> **Upgrades the real E2E harness to avoid false positives**: `testing_mcp` now hard-fails when classifier dependencies can’t be bootstrapped (and verifies semantic routing actually enabled via server logs), propagates/generates `STREAM_RESPONSE_SIGNING_SECRET`, adds a `--full` mode with an `EVIDENCE_SIGNATURE_GUARD` that requires multiple properly-shaped signed *responses*, and updates the level-up hijack regression test to a two-step Firestore-reload verification.
> 
> <sup>Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit 7dde6cf67dac1982d1f302e1a1cf8369b709ec94. Bugbot is set up for automated code reviews on this repo. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).</sup>
<!-- /CURSOR_SUMMARY -->

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Fixed level-up modal appearing during character creation flow.

* **Tests**
  * Enhanced E2E agent hijack scenario validation with improved two-step verification.
  * Added signature verification guard for response validation.
  * Added environmental health testing guidelines for server bootstrap checks.

* **Chores**
  * Improved test infrastructure with dependency checks and environment variable propagation.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
title: fix(test): fix level-up E2E harness to use two-step routing verification
